findings.blocker: sectionCechComplex is CochainComplex Ab ℕ whose degree-p object is the CATEGORICAL product ∏ᶜ in Ab — NOT a ModuleCat object and NOT syntactically a pi type. So ShortComplex.moduleCat_exact_iff does not apply directly. Bridge needs: (1) Concrete.productEquiv (∏ᶜ ≅ pi) at element level inside ab_exact_iff, (2) unfold alternatingCofaceMapComplex differential and match each restriction to dCoface via qcohRestriction_eq_comparison, (3) exactAt_iff_isZero_homology + ShortComplex.ab_exact_iff to transport the proved dDiff_exact.
